dict.string: Memory Aid LockBox uses the camera to scan cards and documents.
Memory Aid LockBox uses Face ID to protect your vault.
Memory Aid LockBox uses your location to add a map of where you are to a journal entry.
Memory Aid LockBox needs photo library access to attach images to vault items and to export your vault media back to Apple Photos.
Memory Aid LockBox needs full Photos access to move photos and videos into your vault and remove the originals from Apple Photos.
Memory Aid LockBox adds your appointments and significant dates to Apple Calendar.
Memory Aid LockBox adds appointment prep, follow-ups, and receipt grocery lists to Apple Reminders.
Memory Aid LockBox adds your appointments and significant dates to Apple Calendar.
